topics: Set up and install Hadoop and explore the various shell commands in Hadoop and implement file management tasks
Implement a word count program using Map Reduce to find the number of occurrences of specific keywords from an input file
Write a Hadoop program that calculates the average word length of all words that start with each character
Write a Map Reduce program for removing stop words from the given text files
Implement matrix multiplication with Hadoop Map Reduce
Implement Pig Latin scripts to sort, group, join, project, and filter data
Write an R program to find the factorial and check for palindromes
Implement a program to find variance, covariance and correlation between different types of attributes
Write an R program to solve linear regression and make predictions
Write an R program to solve logistic regression
Implement SVM and Decision Tree Classifier using R
Implement KNN and Naive Bayes Classifier using R
Implement a Spark program that counts the total number of observations, the number of years over which observations have been made, and displays the oldest and newest year of observation
